Cause: WinGet installs to deep non-PATH directory
Fix: Auto-detect via glob pattern in ~/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/Gyan.FFmpeg*/ffmpeg*/bin. Set ffmpeg_location in yt-dlp opts

Cause: Backslashes in inline JS onclick handlers get escaped
Fix: Use data-* attributes + addEventListener instead of inline onclick with paths
Keywords: explorer folder path backslash onclick windows

Cause: Unavailable video kills entire batch extraction
Fix: Add ignoreerrors: True to yt-dlp opts and filter None entries from results
Code Example: opts = {'ignoreerrors': True}; entries = [e for e in info.get('entries', []) if e is not None]

Cause: Japanese chars detected before Chinese keywords in mixed titles
Fix: _ZH_KEYWORDS check runs FIRST and overrides Japanese char detection
Keywords: language filter japanese chinese detection keyword

Cause: Not a valid yt-dlp URL scheme
Fix: Use ytsearch + local sort by upload_date instead
Code Example: Use 'ytsearch20:{query}' with sort key=lambda e: e.get('upload_date')

Cause: Flat extraction skips per-video metadata for speed
Fix: Use full extraction for trending mode with ignoreerrors: True
Code Example: extract_flat: 'in_playlist' is fast but no upload_date. Full extraction is slow but complete

Fix: Hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) or Flask debug mode auto-reloads
Code Example: Flask debug=True auto-reloads on app.py changes. Browser needs hard refresh for CSS/JS

Cause: YouTube timedtext API IP-level rate limit from too many requests
Fix: Global cooldown _subtitle_429_until (5min). NO retries — single attempt then cooldown

Cause: video_id mismatch between _extract_video_id() regex and info.get('id')
Fix: Always pass video_id explicitly from frontend (stored from /api/info response)
Keywords: subtitle store miss video_id mismatch cache
Code Example: Pass video_id from frontend: body: JSON.stringify({ url, lang, video_id: currentVideoId })

Cause: YouTube only provides VTT format natively (not SRT)
Fix: Always fetch VTT then convert to SRT with _vtt_to_srt() converter
Keywords: srt vtt format convert subtitle youtube

Fix: Use threading.Lock context manager for all store read/write operations
Keywords: thread lock concurrent race condition progress

Cause: Multiple downloads of same video overwrite existing file
Fix: Counter suffix loop: filename (1).ext — filename (2).ext etc

Cause: Very large MP4 or slow connection exceeds probe timeout
Fix: 15s timeout on Range: bytes=0-16383 fetch. Fails if moov/sidx not in first 16KB
Keywords: dash probe timeout mp4 moov sidx range

Cause: print() on Windows uses cp1252 encoding which breaks Unicode
Fix: Add flush=True to all print() calls. Write to temp file + read with UTF-8 for subprocess
Keywords: windows encoding utf8 pipe print flush

Cause: VTT fetch returns HTML error page (Google 429 page) instead of VTT
Fix: Check content starts with 'WEBVTT' before caching. Return None if HTML detected
Keywords: subtitle empty html error 429 google page
Code Example: Check response content-type and first line before caching

Cause: @handle format not recognized or channel unavailable
Fix: Try direct channel URL fetch first then fall back to ytsearch
Code Example: Fall back to f'ytsearch20:@{handle}' if direct URL fails
